chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D- 7642 of 2018 Date Order with signature of Judge Priority. 1. For orders on CMA No. 11462/21. (Rule 50). 2. For hearing of CMA No. 33494/18. 3. For hearing of main case. -------------- 27.09.2024 None present on behalf of the Petitioner. Mr. Khalid Mehmood Rajpar, Advocate for Respondent. Mr. Kashif Nazeer, Assistant Attorney General. ______________ None present on behalf of the Petitioner nor any intimation received. Same was the position on the last date of hearing. It reflects that Petitioner is not interested in proceeding with this matter. Accordingly, the Petition is dismissed for non-prosecution with pending application(s). JUDGE JUDGE
